understanding.goal_understanding: Complete the KA59 puzzle by progressing through all levels, winning each level by placing every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+' so that all goals are occupied simultaneously.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The currently selected piece (shown as P) moves one grid cell per MOVE action on a 3-pixels-per-cell coordinate system; other selectables are shown as S and can be controlled by CLICKing their exact pixel/grid position to switch selection. Walls (#) act as solid obstacles that prevent movement through them, while blocks (B) are pushable when directly adjacent in the movement direction—moving into them attempts to shift the block along with the selected piece if space allows; blocked-direction hints indicate nearby objects but don’t guarantee failure.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear enclosed by walls on all sides; try moving right to confirm whether any wall is passable/pushable or if movement is fully blocked.
history.reasoning: We appear enclosed by walls on all sides; try moving right to confirm whether any wall is passable/pushable or if movement is fully blocked.

history.summary: Turn 2: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear enclosed by walls on all four sides; try pushing into the right wall to see if it’s a passable boundary/teleporter behavior.
history.reasoning: We appear enclosed by walls on all four sides; try pushing into the right wall to see if it’s a passable boundary/teleporter behavior.

history.summary: Turn 3: MOVE_RIGHT | We’re boxed in by walls; the only possible interaction is with the adjacent selectable on the right, so try pushing/moving into it to see if it can shift.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls; the only possible interaction is with the adjacent selectable on the right, so try pushing/moving into it to see if it can shift.

history.summary: Turn 4: CLICK | All directions are walled off for this piece; switch control to the other selectable at [33,21] to try reaching the goal area.
history.reasoning: All directions are walled off for this piece; switch control to the other selectable at [33,21] to try reaching the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 5: MOVE_RIGHT | We need to place this selectable onto the goal cluster; try moving onto the adjacent goal tile to the right despite the wall hint.
history.reasoning: We need to place this selectable onto the goal cluster; try moving onto the adjacent goal tile to the right despite the wall hint.

history.summary: Turn 6: MOVE_UP | We are already on the goal area; try moving up onto the central goal tile to satisfy win condition if only one goal exists.
history.reasoning: We are already on the goal area; try moving up onto the central goal tile to satisfy win condition if only one goal exists.
